feed.subtitle: Latest gigs and events in Oslo, Norway
feed.title: Oslo Gig Guide

entry.content:
Venue: Vulkan Arena
Start: 2026-10-24 19:00
Tags: rock, emo, punk


DUE TO HUGE DEMAND! The Emo Festival is coming to Oslo! 💀🖤

The greatest tribute night to the music that was never just a phase… 🖤

TEENAGE NOSTALGIA featuring all your biggest emo songs in existence with A LIVE BAND & LIVE DJs spinning all the angst your teenage dirtbag heart desires all night long! LIVE Performers, confetti & much more!

Put on your eyeliner, lace up your high-tops and get ready to rock to all your favourite nostalgic emo anthems!

This event is 18+! Please note this is a standing event!


Tickets: www.ticketmaster.no
entry.summary: The Emo Festival Comes to Oslo! at Vulkan Arena on 2026-10-24 19:00
entry.title: The Emo Festival Comes to Oslo! (2026-10-24)
